## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [PSEO content production to ramp up to 300/month; editing process TBD](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Impressions down but clicks/CTR up week-over-week; September on track for significant growth](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [AI integration, tools, and student engagement are top-performing blog categories](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [Team to develop content addressing concerns/realities of AI in education based on recent article](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=2451.0)

## Topics

### PSEO Content Production

  - [Aiming for 300 PSEO pieces/month](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Nikki to review 10 sample pieces next week to assess quality](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Editing process still undecided; concerns about over-editing templated content](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Internal linking workflow needs refinement](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Content Performance

  - [Impressions down 3% week-over-week, but clicks up over 20%](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [CTR and average position showing significant improvements](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [September trending towards massive surge in performance](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [LM (large model) citations increasing, especially for ChatGPT and Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

### Blog Category Performance

  - [Top categories: AI integration, AI teaching tools/platforms, AI for student engagement](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [Lower performing: formative and summative assessments](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Team to consider calculated field in Looker for sessions/piece to remove content volume bias](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)

### Content Refreshes

  - [Study of past refreshes shows positive impact on performance](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
  - [Example: "Best free AI school tools for teachers" saw significant click increase post-refresh](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)

### AI in Education Content Strategy

  - [Team to develop content addressing teacher/school concerns about AI integration](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=2451.0)
  - [Focus on real experiences, addressing fears, and acknowledging the ongoing "experiment"](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=2497.0)
  - [Potential topics from recent article shared by CRO](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=2451.0)
  - [Emphasis on AI literacy and safe integration into schools](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=2546.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Megan to conduct keyword research for new content batch, including refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Team to investigate Grok citations and potential strategies to improve](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Nikki to discuss PSEO editing process with Colton](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Develop new content topics based on recent AI in education article](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=2451.0)
  - [Explore creation of content featuring teacher experiences with AI in classrooms](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=2271.0)
  - [Nikki to check on status of math partnership for potential content development](https://fathom.video/share/uhT3vbfsZouxyThyAPzVsmL9W6-qPnW3?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)
